note: Activity -> playbook map (the brain's table of contents). The CI agent reads this, semantically matches a task's description to exactly ONE activity by its `match` sentence, and follows the named playbook. No confident match => the agent declares the task NOVEL and stops for a human (no auto write-back).

activities.title: Add a feature to an existing app
activities.match: Add or change a user-facing capability in a Flutter app that already exists and builds.

activities.title: Scaffold a brand-new app
activities.match: The repo is empty or has no Flutter app yet; stand up the initial project and its This60 wiring.
